features: EFFECTIVE -- Galpharm Anti-Diarrhoea Instants 2mg Orodispersible Tablets contain Loperamide Hydrochloride which is an antidiarrheal medicine which helps to stop diarrhoea by making the stools more solid and less frequent.
FAST RELIEF -- Fast acting tablets help to stop diarrhoea by making the stools more solid and less frequent. They work fast to soothe your diarrhoea symptoms.
SO YOU CAN LIVE YOUR LIFE -- Provides effective relief from acute and mild diarrhoea, allowing you to get back to doing the things you love.
SAFE FOR ADULTS AND TEENAGERS -- This medicine is used for the treatment of sudden short-lived (acute) attacks of diarrhoea in adults and children of 12 years and over.
Package contents: 2 packs of 6 tablets each. Actual packaging may vary.
description: Product description Galpharm Anti-Diarrhoea Instants 2mg Orodispersible Tablets contain Loperamide Hydrochloride which is an antidiarrheal medicine which helps to stop diarrhoea by making the stools more solid and less frequent. This medicine is used for the treatment of sudden short-lived (acute) attacks of diarrhoea in adults and children of 12 years and over. It can also be used by adults of 18 years and over who have irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), which has been previously diagnosed by a doctor, to relieve short term diarrhoea associated with it. Please note that these tablets relieve the symptoms of diarrhoea and should not be used as a substitute for rehydration treatment. Ingredients Active ingredient: Loperamide Hydrochloride 2mg is the basic component Other Ingredients: Lactulose, Maize Starch, Talc, Magnesium Stearate, Gelatin, Quinoline Yellow (E104), Erythrosine (E127), Patent Blue (E131) and Titanium Dioxide (E171)
